node.statement: Step C1 (Algebraic identity, paper line 773 CAP6-8). For every integer L >= 1 and r >= 0 there exist polynomials A_r^L(x), B_r^L(x) (Shifted-coeffs) such that P_{L+r}(x) = A_r^L(x) P_L(x) + B_r^L(x) P_{L-1}(x). Proof: induct on r using Bonnet-recurrence; base cases A_0^L=1, B_0^L=0 and A_{-1}^L=0, B_{-1}^L=1.
